titleStmt.title: SII 42.257: original edition by C Somasundara Rao
No. 257. (A.R. No. 20 of 1956-57.) Peṭlūrupālem, Narasaraopet Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab lying in a field about 2 miles from the main road on the way to Kōṭappakoṇḍa.
Dated in Śaka 1075, Śrīmukha, uttarāyaṇa-sankrānti. May correspond to A.D. 1153, December 24.
Damaged. Seems to record the construction of a tank and an endowment for the havis, bali and archana of god Trikūṭīśvaradēva by a servant of Buddana, son of Dāmōdara and Dāramāṁbā, of Harita-gōtra.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī ma
ḍaṁ(ṁḍa)lēśvara kulō[ttuṁgacōḍa ?]
vijayarājya ci
pravartta(rttha)mā [Ācaṁdrā]rkkastā(sthā)
yinu naḍacucuṁḍu śakavaru
ṣaṁbulu vēyi ḍebbayiyēna
vunēṁṭi śrīmukha saṁvatsara
muna yuttarāAna(yaṇa) saṁkrāṁ
ttināṁḍḍu voṟa haritagōtra
juṁḍu naya manumaṁḍu dāramāṁ
bika tanūjuṁḍu dāmōdaruni koḍuku
buddana baṁṭu raṁdana kaṭṭina ceṟuvu
kāpari śrī trikūṭīśvaradēvaraku haviba
li Arcanalaku nācaṁdrārkasthāyigā

nicci kaṁbamu nilipe yi(Ī)
dharmmuvu Evvarainanu naḍapaṁba(ga)
lavāru [.] Asyōpari nakēnaci
dbādhākarttavyā . yaḥ ka
rōti sa paṁcamahāpātakō bhava
ti . tathācōktaṁ bhaga-vatō vyāsē
na [.] svadattāṁ para-dattāṁ vā yō ha
rētu vasundharāṁ [.]-ṣaṣṭiṁvarṣa sahasrā
ṇi viṣṭā(ṣṭhā)yāṁ-jāyatē krimiḥ [.] ba
hubhirvvasudhādattā bahubhiścānu pā
litā [.] yasya yasya yadā bhū
miḥ tasya tasya tadā phalaṁ(m) [.]
(—) in the middle of the lines indicates gap in writing. Could it be that it was probably the punctuation mark for virāma and was placed wrongly ?
Digital edition of SII 42.257 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
